name: C-3 manifest envelope includes the decision_provenance block (W-4 cross-ref)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/emit-provenance-manifest.sh" --commit abc123 --out m.json --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("m.json","utf8"));const d=j.decision_provenance;process.exit(d&&Array.isArray(d.adrs)?0:1)' && echo block 1>&2
